summary: Tested enhanced service request flow with auto-CONCIERGE routing. All 19 tests passed (100% success rate). Service requests for dog walker, boarding, grooming, training, vet, daycare correctly route to CONCIERGE execution type with proper confirmation banner.
critical_code_review_comments: AUTO-CONCIERGE ROUTING VERIFIED: Lines 2477-2501 in mira_routes.py correctly route service keywords to CONCIERGE execution_type
SERVICE KEYWORDS TESTED: dog walker, dog walking, boarding, pet sitting, grooming appointment, training session, vet appointment, daycare, while i'm away - ALL route to CONCIERGE
CONCIERGE_CONFIRMATION VERIFIED: Lines 2660-2668 correctly generate confirmation object with title, message, ticket_id, show_banner:true
CONFIRMATION LOCATION: concierge_confirmation is returned at TOP LEVEL of API response (not inside 'response' object)
TICKET CREATION VERIFIED: Tickets are created in mira_tickets collection with format CNC-YYYYMMDD-XXXX
ADMIN NOTIFICATIONS: notification_id and inbox_id are created along with ticket (verified via /api/mira/tickets/{id} endpoint)
NO PRODUCTS FOR SERVICES: Service requests correctly return empty products array and show_products=False
seed_data_creation: None - tests create temporary test pets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service request auto-CONCIERGE routing fully tested. Key findings: (1) concierge_confirmation is at TOP LEVEL of response, not inside response.response, (2) Ticket format is CNC-YYYYMMDD-XXXX, (3) Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_service_request_concierge.py covers 9 service keywords with parametrized tests.
